rationale: The synthetic ensures is `BIG_AND ==> det_..._equal(r1, r2)`, so the conjuncts of BIG_AND are not hypotheses in the body — the previous attempt's unguarded asserts therefore failed. Gating the proof on `if BIG_AND { … }` introduces every ensures-conjunct for r1 and r2 as a hypothesis in the then-branch, lets each cross-run pointwise equality be discharged (using `=~=` to lift Seq view equality and trap_frame extensional equality to `==`), and closes the implication vacuously on the else-branch.
